meta.description: Enumerates every internal source bucket across all roles in the episode registry. G001 requires all current buckets to be represented.
meta.honesty_note: This index is descriptive, not aspirational. It records what exists now, including buckets that are blocked or local-only. Each role's buckets are grouped under a role_id key in the completeness section.

buckets.label: Public training curriculum (Frontend Apprentice)
buckets.notes: All seven public families are benchmark_ready and ship in public-benchmark-pack-v1.

buckets.label: Blocked teacher-only families (repo-visible, pending rewrite)
buckets.blocked_reason: Current repo already discloses framing for h1/h2/h3. Cannot honestly claim these as sealed or promote to teacher-only benchmark status until rewritten with fresh non-repo-visible wording.
buckets.notes: Listed in the family registry as blocked_pending_rewrite. Not included in any benchmark pack.

buckets.label: Local-only private holdout evaluation path (Frontend Apprentice)
buckets.notes: Template exists at benchmarks/private-holdout-pack-template.json. Actual holdout episodes are authored locally in a gitignored manifest. No episodes are committed to the repo. This bucket has zero committed families.

buckets.label: Public training curriculum (Frontend/Product Engineer)
buckets.notes: All five phase families are benchmark_ready and ship in fpe-public-benchmark-pack-v1. No blocked families exist because no holdout framing has been disclosed for this role.

buckets.label: Local-only private holdout evaluation path (Frontend/Product Engineer)
buckets.notes: No FPE holdout families are committed. Future teacher-only holdout tasks for this role would be authored locally, gitignored, and never tracked in public packs.

completeness.notes: Every scenario/task across both roles maps to exactly one bucket. The Frontend Apprentice uses scenario_ids (t1-t7, h1-h3) plus four explicit source-intake buckets covering promoted, curated, manual-curation-only, and blocked teacher-only seams. The Frontend/Product Engineer uses acceptance_test_ids (A001-E004).

intake_buckets.label: Promoted public source-intake records (Frontend Apprentice)
intake_buckets.notes: Represents RF-authored, public-safe families already promoted from tracked source intake into the Frontend Apprentice benchmark pack. Today this is the Playwright-backed family only.

intake_buckets.label: Curated public-source candidates awaiting authored families (Frontend Apprentice)
intake_buckets.notes: Source is curated and public-safe to work from, but no RF-authored family is promoted yet. Promotion stays blocked until authored episodes, rubric, and provenance exist.

intake_buckets.label: Manual-curation-only source candidates (Frontend Apprentice)
intake_buckets.notes: Source is discovered only. Manual teacher rewrite is required before any RF-authored family can exist. Bulk import stays blocked.

intake_buckets.label: Blocked teacher-only holdout directions from source intake (Frontend Apprentice)
intake_buckets.notes: Visible seam for teacher-only holdout direction only. Any future use requires manual selection, original RF authorship, and storage outside public packs.
